title: THE NETHERLANDS enforcement action against Ridetech International B.V. (100,000,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Dutch DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 100,000,000 on Ridetech International B.V. The controller, the operator of the taxi app 'Yangoo', has failed to implement adequate guarantees for the transfer of personal data into a third country.
